world.title: AU, Côte d'Ivoire Launch Continental Education Accountability Framework

ai.title: Bryson DeChambeau Enters AI Space With an Eight-Figure Deal After Parting Ways From His Former Sponsor
ai.description: On April 7th, a group of investors led by U.S. Open winner Bryson DeChambeau announced their acquisition of Sportsbox AI. A Seattle‑based sports tech startup, Sportsbox AI, is currently leading in kinematic AI technology and 3D motion capture for coaching and training across mobile sports and fitness applications.
